title: Home Care Worker Immigration pilots - Canada.ca
content:
## Home Care Worker Immigration pilots
The Home Care Worker Immigration pilots for Child Care and Home Support help skilled workers who have a job offer in the field immigrate to Canada permanently.

## Apply for permanent residence through the pilots
You may be eligible to apply for permanent residence through the pilots if you have
- a full-time job offer in home care
- relevant work experience or training
- the required language skills and education

## Hire skilled workers through the pilots
Employers can hire qualified home care workers through these pilots.
